contentPattern.structure: side-by-side columns (image | text, or text | text panels, or a row of stat tiles)
usedFor: Investor Relations + Results 2Q promo panels (text | highlighted text)
Allianz at a glance 4-up statistic tiles (number + caption)

suitableFor: side-by-side text/image panels for comparisons or feature callouts
balanced multi-column rows such as stat/facts bands (number + caption)
notSuitableFor: uniform repeating cards with images (use cards / cards-teaser)
single-column stacked content that reads better vertically
